allow:
Bash(cat > /Users/serdun/Documents/work/webtrit/webtrit_callkeep/webtrit_callkeep/analysis_options.yaml << 'EOF'
include: package:flutter_lints/flutter.yaml

linter:
  rules:
    prefer_single_quotes: true

analyzer:
  exclude:
    - "**/*.g.dart"
    - "**/*.pigeon.dart"

formatter:
  page_width: 120
EOF)
